ranked_movies.title: Pride and Prejudice
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed across multiple threads (r/janeausten, r/ForeverAloneWomen, r/ifyoulikeblank) with comparisons between the 1995 and 2005 adaptations. Praised for its timeless romance, character development, and as a benchmark for the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended in r/MovieSuggestions and mentioned by men in r/AskMen as a favorite. Appreciated for its blend of humor, heart, and effective rom-com storytelling.

ranked_movies.title: La La Land
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a personal favorite in r/AskMen and r/ifyoulikeblank. Loved for its musical numbers, bittersweet ending, and modern take on the Hollywood romance.

ranked_movies.title: The Proposal
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested in r/MovieSuggestions for date nights and mentioned in r/romancemovies as an example of a power dynamic romance. Noted for its chemistry between Reynolds and Bullock.

ranked_movies.title: Before Sunrise
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in r/MovieSuggestions for a meaningful, tender romance. The entire 'Before' trilogy is held in high regard for its realistic and profound portrayal of love and connection.

ranked_movies.title: Notting Hill
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested in r/romancemovies as the 'OG' film for the trope of a famous woman with an ordinary man. A classic rom-com staple.

ranked_movies.title: Long Shot
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in r/romancemovies and r/ifyoulikeblank. Praised for the surprising chemistry between Seth Rogen and Charlize Theron and its fresh, hilarious take on the genre.

ranked_movies.title: 500 Days of Summer
ranked_movies.reason: Listed in r/MovieSuggestions. A modern classic known for its non-linear narrative and deconstruction of romantic tropes.

ranked_movies.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a favorite in r/AskMen. Celebrated for its unique, sci-fi-infused plot and deeply emotional exploration of love and memory.

ranked_movies.title: When Harry Met Sally
ranked_movies.reason: A top suggestion in r/MovieSuggestions. A foundational rom-com frequently debated as the ultimate 'can men and women be friends' story.

ranked_movies.title: Amelie
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested in r/MovieSuggestions and r/ifyoulikeblank. Loved for its whimsical, charming, and uniquely French take on romance.

ranked_movies.title: Stardust
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in r/AskMen as a favorite and in r/romancemovies. A fantasy-adventure romance noted for its charm and heart.

ranked_movies.title: The Notebook
ranked_movies.reason: Heavily discussed in r/AskMen, often cited as both a favorite and the most overrated. Its polarizing nature makes it a frequently mentioned touchstone in romance movie conversations.

ranked_movies.title: About Time
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in r/AskMen and r/ifyoulikeblank. Loved for its heartfelt story that blends romance with family themes and a sci-fi twist.

ranked_movies.title: Crazy Rich Asians
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested in r/TwentiesIndia and listed as a favorite in r/ifyoulikeblank. Praised for its glamour, humor, and cultural significance.

ranked_movies.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested in r/MovieSuggestions and also cited in r/AskMen as an example of a bad/overrated film, making it a widely discussed and recognizable title.

ranked_movies.title: Love Actually
ranked_movies.reason: Listed in r/MovieSuggestions and mentioned in r/AskMen. A popular ensemble holiday rom-com that is a recurring topic of discussion.

ranked_movies.title: The Shape of Water
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a favorite in r/ForeverAloneWomen. Noted for its unique and odd but heartfelt romantic storyline.

ranked_movies.title: Flipped
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in r/TwentiesIndia and r/romancemovies. Described as a good, underrated movie with a happy ending and a classic young love story.

ranked_movies.title: Goblin
ranked_movies.reason: The top choice in the r/kdramas library list. While a series, its frequent mention and high praise (cinematography, OST, romance) warrant its inclusion as a highly recommended story.
